economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership (16.67%), Mahihkan Bus Lines Limited Partnership (16.67%), and Nekote Limited Partnership (14.29%). Major capital projects underway: new school ($10.6M contract), new water treatment plant (~$9.3M contract), new lagoon (~$5.7M contract). Previously under third-party management for ISC and health programs, exited August/September 2018.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Nation was previously under third-party management for ISC and health programs, fully exited by October 2018. Large deferred revenue balance of $8.4M primarily from capital projects (new school, water treatment plant, lagoon). Restricted cash of $6.93M held for capital construction projects. Net book value of tangible capital assets not extractable from text (Schedule 1 referenced but not provided). Six entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs). Eleven departments/entities fully consolidated. No remuneration schedule provided in extracted text.
